matchingDescription: CFD and spread betting platform for leveraged trading on stocks, forex, indices, commodities and crypto. Capital at risk. Suitable for experienced traders comfortable with leveraged products.

variants.text: The Bank for International Settlements estimates global OTC derivatives notional outstanding at $708 trillion. Trading 212's CFD platform provides retail access to 10,000+ instruments including stocks, forex pairs, commodities and indices. Capital at risk.

The BIS Triennial Survey reports daily forex turnover of $7.5 trillion, making it the world's largest and most liquid financial market. Trading 212 offers 180+ forex pairs with spreads from 0.8 pips. 76% of retail CFD accounts lose money.

FCA regulations cap retail CFD leverage at 30:1 for major forex pairs and 20:1 for major indices. A £1,000 deposit controls up to £30,000 of forex exposure. Trading 212 provides real-time margin calculations and automatic stop-loss tools.

Academic research shows short sellers identify overvalued stocks an average of 6 months before price corrections materialise (Karpoff & Lou, 2010). Trading 212 CFDs allow short positions on 10,000+ instruments without borrowing shares.

CFD overnight financing is typically calculated at the benchmark rate plus a spread of 0.5-3%. On a £10,000 long position held 30 days at 5.25% plus 1%, the financing cost is approximately £51. Trading 212 publishes all financing rates transparently.
